## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader-carrier/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader-carrier/issues/new?body=module:%20shopinvader_delivery_carrier%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
